title: Post-Compression Generated-Adapter Baseline Review

issue_classifications.title: [Review]: Verify post-compression generated-adapter baseline remains clean
issue_classifications.evidence: Generated adapter checks, planning checks, generated-tool conformance, startup adapter inspection, default report shape, and reconcile were reviewed. Baseline is clean for generated adapters and planning residue; report warnings are environmental uv-cache nested repo warnings, not product-shape drift.

goal: Verify the post-compression generated-adapter baseline before adding more adapters or lifecycle behavior.
non_goals: Do not use this generated skeleton as proof that review work is complete.

review_mode.review question: Is the post-compression/generated-adapter state clean enough to continue implementation?

review_method.commands used: uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_adapters.py --check; uv run pytest tests/test_generated_tool_conformance.py -q; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --format json; uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json
review_method.evidence sources: AGENTS.md, llms.txt, tools/AGENT_QUICKSTART.md, tools/AGENT_ROUTING.md, generated adapter status output, default report router output, planning reconcile output

findings.title: Generated adapter baseline is clean
findings.evidence: Contract tooling reports agentic-workspace defaults and agentic-planning-bootstrap status generated outputs as current with direct_edit_detected=false; generator --check passes; generated-tool conformance passes.
findings.notes: Next safe implementation target is one additional read-only package adapter, preferably memory status.

findings.title: First-contact startup remains one clear path
findings.evidence: AGENTS.md routes ordinary startup to start; llms.txt and tools adapters are generated/non-authoritative compatibility surfaces; AGENT_ROUTING is secondary and short.

findings.title: Default report is router-shaped; planning residue is clean
findings.evidence: Default report exposes router fields and section hints while keeping high-volume sections behind selectors. Reconcile is clean with four tracked open issues after ingestion.
findings.notes: Report health is attention-needed due to uv-cache nested repository warnings; this is environmental workspace hygiene, not generated-adapter drift.

recommendation.defer: Do not reopen #230 without fresh product-shape evidence.

retention.closeout shape: shrink or archive after findings are routed
retention.proof surface: this review record plus routed follow-up residue
